# CONVERT_ME: math.trig 1.0.0

Status: Migration complete

Classification:
- `src/platform/x16/trig.c`: Table-driven implementation using fixed RAM address `0x0400`
- `src/platform/host/trig.c`: No-op stub with `printf` traces

Notes:
- Functions renamed from `sin`/`cos`/`atan` to `trig_sin`/`trig_cos`/`trig_atan` to avoid
  collision with C standard library builtins (`double` signatures in `<math.h>`).
- The trig table at `0x0400` is X16-specific; host stub returns 0 for all calls.
- Table data is in `data/x16/`; generated by `tools/build-trig-table.pl`.

TODO:
- [x] Move `src/trig.c` -> `src/platform/x16/trig.c`
- [x] Add `src/platform/host/trig.c` stub (compiled OK with `gcc`)
- [x] Rename `sin`/`cos`/`atan` -> `trig_sin`/`trig_cos`/`trig_atan` (no more stdlib collision)
- [ ] Add `test/platform/host/` to validate stub linkage and API usage
- [ ] On-device validation of table lookup accuracy on CX16
